ISS Test Plan Generator

Type an ISS ticket number → Get a ready-to-execute Excel test plan in seconds

📋 What You Get

  • ✅ Professional Excel workbook with 5 sheets
  • ✅ Executive Summary with offer statistics
  • ✅ Offer Summary with all details
  • ✅ Positive test cases (2-3 per offer)
  • ✅ Negative test cases (2-4 per offer)
  • ✅ Consolidated All Tests sheet
  • ✅ Ready for immediate QA execution
